gist.headline: Flashcards, but make them pretty
gist.blurb: AnkiTect just joined the greenhouse! It's a clever community tool that generates multimedia Anki flashcards from word lists, using our API to automatically add context-relevant images for language learning.
gist.summary: Added AnkiTect to the community showcase, a tool that generates multimedia Anki flashcards with context-relevant images using the pollinations.ai API.
gist.impact: Language learners can now discover a new community tool that automatically enhances their Anki study decks with AI-generated imagery.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about Anki flashcards and language learning. Visual symbols include flashcards, books, and studying. Polly the bee wearing reading glasses, studying with the Robot companion who is displaying a picture flashcard on its screen.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, looking at a chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head. The robot is holding up a glowing flashcard showing a picture of an apple. A stack of books and scattered flashcards sits nearby. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
